channel.title: 🪴 Astra's Digital Garden
channel.description: Last 10 notes on 🪴 Astra's Digital Garden

item.title: Discord Reactive
item.description: Reactive allows you to easily visualize your Discord voice call in OBS with a single browser source. It’s like Discord Streamkit but more customizable and easier to use.

item.title: Streamer.bot
item.description: Streamer.bot is a tool to integrate OBS, Twitch, Stream Elements, and more when livestreaming. I primarily use it to toggle overlays in OBS when Twitch ads begin/end.

item.title: Livestreaming Resources
item.description: This section details tools/resources for livestreaming (on Twitch or elsewhere, and via OBS or other tools).

item.title: VDO.Ninja
item.description: VDO.Ninja is a free tool that allows remote sources (a phone, another person’s computer, etc) to be brought in to OBS as a Browser Source.

item.title: Home
item.description: Hello, and welcome to my Digital Garden! More information coming soon!.
